tasks.title: Add seed_ref, task_ref, and condensed_from to JSON schemas
tasks.description: Update task-schema.json to add two optional string fields (seed_ref, task_ref) to task item properties. Update seed-schema.json to add an optional condensed_from field (array of strings). Both changes are backward-compatible — existing files without these fields still pass validation.
acceptance_criteria: task-schema.json defines seed_ref and task_ref as optional string properties in the task items block
seed-schema.json defines condensed_from as an optional array of strings
validate-schema.sh passes with exit 0 on all existing files in docs/tasks/
validate-schema.sh passes with exit 0 on all existing files in docs/seeds/

tasks.title: Update to-tasks to enrich triage emission with context and backlinks
tasks.description: Update to-tasks SKILL.md step 3a to enrich triage task items emitted from deferred[] entries: set description = deferred.text + newline + deferred.context (if present); set seed_ref = seed filename basename only (no directory prefix); set task_ref = output task file filename basename only. Also update step 6: source.ref is written as basename only (e.g. '20260606-1550-foo.json'), not a relative path.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md step 3a instructs: description = deferred.text + deferred.context (if present, separated by newline), seed_ref = seed basename, task_ref = output task file basename
SKILL.md step 6 instructs: source.ref is the seed filename basename only
A triage task emitted from a deferred[] item that has a context field carries that context appended to its description

tasks.title: Render backlink footer in export-tasks for non-corporate wall items
tasks.description:
Update export-tasks (agent and/or adapter scripts) to append a backlink footer to the issue/page body for triage items where the destination wall is not 'corporate'. After resolving the adapter for a triage item, read the wall value from task-routing.json using the item's domain. If wall != 'corporate', append the following after the description body: '---
seed: <seed_ref>
task: <task_ref>
task_id: <id>'. Corporate-wall items (standard-metrics) receive no backlinks — suppressed entirely.
acceptance_criteria: export-tasks appends the backlink footer for personal-wall and project-wall items
export-tasks omits the backlink footer for corporate-wall items
wall value is read from task-routing.json destinations[domain].wall, not hardcoded

tasks.title: Corporate triage item enrichment and backlink strategy
tasks.description:
Corporate triage item enrichment and backlink strategy.

Personal-wall items now carry seed_ref + task_ref backlinks and per-item context. Corporate-wall items are stripped of backlinks at export time. The open question is whether corporate items should receive any enrichment at all, or whether a separate enrichment path exists (e.g. Linear description fields populated differently).
acceptance_criteria: Item has been exported to its destination by export-tasks

tasks.title: clean-scaffolding archival structure
tasks.description:
clean-scaffolding archival structure.

Currently clean-scaffolding deletes seeds, tasks, handoffs. With backlinks now pointing to filenames, archival moves are safe (filename-only refs resolve via find). The user is considering a Django-migration-style condensation approach but has not settled the structure. condensed_from field in seed schema is a prerequisite for this.
acceptance_criteria: Item has been exported to its destination by export-tasks
